title: Editas Medicine Announces New Safety and Efficacy Data from RUBY Trial in Sickle Cell Disease at EHA Congress
text: Editas Medicine announced new safety and efficacy data from RUBY trial of reni-cel in sickle cell disease presented at European Hematology Association 2024 Congress in June. The trial continued to demonstrate strong efficacy profile with sustained hemoglobin normalization and increased fetal hemoglobin in patients with severe sickle cell disease. Clinical data presented at EHA showed durable improvements in patient outcomes with continued vaso-occlusive event-free status. Follow-up data demonstrated sustained engraftment of gene-edited cells and maintained therapeutic benefit over extended observation periods. Safety profile remained consistent with conditioning regimen. Company announced plans for additional data presentations at major scientific conferences including American Society of Hematology annual meeting later in 2024.
